CHAVCNN_2023: Environmental Justice Impact Rate (% of population), 2023

EDE_2020-2024: Residents 25 or older with a four-year college (bachelor's) degree or higher
PMC_2020: Annual average concentration in micrograms per cubic meter. PM 2.5, or particulate matter smaller than 2.5 microns in diameter, is one of the most dangerous pollutants because the particles can penetrate deep into the alveoli of the lungs.
CHAKUCW_2017: Percent of Community Area shaded with tree foliage
POV_2020-2024: Percent of residents in families that are in poverty (below the Federal Poverty Level).
CHAVCNN_2023: Estimated percent of population within a community area that live in an Environmental Justice (EJ) priority neighborhood. (Based on Chicago EJ Index score - https://chicagohealthatlas.org/indicators/CHAIXYP?topic=chicago-environmental-justice-index)
CHAKNKC_2023: Estimated count of population within a community area that live in an Environmental Justice (EJ) priority neighborhood. (Based on Chicago EJ Index score - https://chicagohealthatlas.org/indicators/CHAIXYP?topic=chicago-environmental-justice-index)

EDE_2020-2024: U.S. Census Bureau - American Community Survey (ACS) (Table B15002)
INC_2020-2024: U.S. Census Bureau - American Community Survey (ACS) (Table B19013)
PMC_2020: Environmental Protection Agency - Environmental Justice Screening (EJScreen) (EJSCREEN)
POV_2020-2024: U.S. Census Bureau - American Community Survey (ACS) (Table B17001)
CHAVCNN_2023: Chicago Department of Public Health - Environmental Permitting and Inspection
CHAKNKC_2023: Chicago Department of Public Health - Environmental Permitting and Inspection
